update: 🐣 First Chick Has Hatched! Early this morning, the first robin chick successfully hatched. Mom quickly removed the eggshell and is now caring for her new arrival. Two eggs remain, and we expect more chicks soon!
funfact: LIFE EXPECTANCY: On average, American robins live about 1-2 years in the wild. They have the potential to live up to 14 years, but this is extremely rare. Only about ¼ of young robins survive their first year of life.
